short_description: Recurring Ridgeline 500s under load
description: Root cause analysis for repeated 500 errors traced to connection pool and failover handling.

short_description: Postgres slow queries from missing indexes
description: Pattern of slow search and report queries due to absent GIN and composite indexes.

short_description: NUC nodes unstable after power events
description: Worker nodes repeatedly go NotReady or panic after UPS and power blips.

short_description: Recurring disk pressure from unpruned data
description: Nodes hit disk pressure from old images and unbounded Loki log volume growth.

short_description: TLS certificate renewals failing on DNS-01
description: cert-manager renewals stall on Cloudflare DNS-01 propagation, risking expiry.

short_description: Expired credentials breaking automation jobs
description: Backups and image pulls fail when IAM and GHCR tokens silently expire without rotation.

short_description: DNS edits causing intermittent outages
description: Manual Cloudflare DNS changes break mail alignment and origin routing after node swaps.

short_description: Pod evictions from memory limits set too low
description: Ridgeline API pods OOMKilled and evicted under traffic spikes due to undersized memory limits.

short_description: SendGrid emails landing in spam folders
description: Transactional mail flagged as spam due to DKIM misalignment and missing DMARC policy on ridgelinesystems.com.

short_description: Postgres connection exhaustion during deploys
description: Rolling deploys leak connections and exhaust the pool, causing brief outages until PgBouncer recycles.

short_description: Backup jobs silently failing to S3
description: Nightly pg_dump uploads fail intermittently with expired presigned URLs and no alerting on failure.

short_description: Flaky CI runs blocking merges
description: GitHub Actions integration tests fail intermittently due to race conditions in test database setup.

short_description: Home network UPS failing to sustain runtime
description: Battery runtime on the homelab UPS degraded, causing unclean shutdowns of the k8s control plane.

short_description: Glanceboard websocket disconnects under load
description: Live board updates drop connections when the Go sync service hits goroutine and file descriptor limits.

short_description: Image pulls throttled by Docker Hub limits
description: CI and cluster image pulls hit anonymous Docker Hub rate limits, breaking deploys at peak hours.

short_description: Prometheus storage filling root volume
description: Metrics retention set too high fills the monitoring node's disk, stalling alert evaluation.

short_description: Segment events dropped on schema mismatch
description: Analytics events silently rejected by destinations when event property types drift across releases.

short_description: Stripe webhooks missed during downtime
description: Subscription state drifts when Stripe webhook retries exhaust during cluster maintenance windows.

short_description: Ingress 502s after cert-manager upgrade
description: Upgrading cert-manager broke webhook admission, intermittently returning 502s on new ingress routes.

short_description: Worker queue backlog from slow downstream API
description: Ridgeline link-fetch workers back up when target sites rate-limit, with no backoff or dead-letter handling.
